caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a black sweatshirt with "BOSS TALK" in gold lettering sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a black table equipped with a professional microphone and a black mug featuring a logo and the text "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeating logo with five gold stars and the phrase "UNICORN HUSTLE". A blue sign on the wall above reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. He wears a silver watch on his left wrist. As the scene progresses, he moves his right hand toward his face in a gesturing motion, shifting his expression and head position while continuing to talk into the microphone.
